meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to overcome 'no project ideas' through strategic portfolio building. A beginner's guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your MVP fast.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Instead, treat your portfolio as a R&D laboratory. By building high-utility micro-SaaS tools using Antigravity and Claude Code, you validate technical stacks and market interest simultaneously. This strategy transforms 'no ideas' into a pipeline of functional assets that attract potential customers and investors.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of every aspiring founder. You have the ambition, the capital to invest time, and the hunger to build, but you are paralyzed by the 'idea void.' You keep searching for the elusive unicorn while your technical skills atrophy and the market moves on without you.

It is time to stop searching and start building. Portfolio building isn't about vanity projects; it is a tactical deployment of assets designed to prove your competency and uncover hidden market pain points. By utilizing modern AI-assisted engineering, you can turn a weekend of coding into a validated MVP that proves your viability as a founder.

steps.title: Define Your Niche Domain
steps.description: Don't build for everyone. Select a boring, high-value industry like logistics, legal tech, or SMB management. We use AI to map out common pain points in these sectors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 5 manual workflows in the SMB bookkeeping industry and suggest three micro-SaaS features that could automate these tasks.

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate. Speed is your only competitive advantage at this stage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase architecture for a micro-SaaS that focuses on data extraction and PDF generation.

steps.title: Implement Core Logic with AI
steps.description: Focus on the 'One Key Feature' that solves the user's problem. Avoid scope creep by strictly limiting the MVP to a single, high-utility function.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust function to process raw CSV input into structured JSON, handling edge cases for missing headers and invalid date formats.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/lib/processor.ts --task 'implement robust CSV parsing'

steps.title: Build for Monetization
steps.description: Integration of Stripe is non-negotiable. If you aren't collecting payments, it's a hobby, not a business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Stripe checkout session handler in the Next.js API route that supports subscription-based access to the tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/app/api/checkout/route.ts --task 'integrate stripe subscription checkout'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Ship it. Use a staging environment to solicit immediate feedback from at least 10 potential users in your target niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for Vercel that includes environment variable validation and database migration checks.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'ugly' functional MVPs over beautiful designs; users pay for solutions, not CSS animations.
Ship your code to a live domain within 48 hours to prevent the 'perfectionism trap'.
Use your portfolio projects as cold-outreach assets; show prospects what you built instead of telling them what you can do.
Always include a 'Request a Feature' button; it is the single best way to discover your next product idea.
Document your build process in public to build an audience of potential early adopters while you code.
content.next_steps: After deploying your MVP, reach out to 50 people in your target niche on LinkedIn or Twitter. Ask them to test your tool in exchange for a lifetime discount. Use their feedback to iterate or pivot.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical roadmap to stop waiting for inspiration and start engineering your success. Every day you delay is a day a competitor builds the solution you're sitting on. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
